steps.name: Register a new entry in Registration Form with success
Open the Registration Form to add a new register
Fill the First Name Input with value Test
Fill the Last Name Input with value Automation 1
Fill the Email Input with value test@test.com
Fill the Age Input with value 20
Fill the Salary Input with value 1000
Fill the Department Input with value QA
Click on submit button at Registration Form
Verify if new register is added correctly

statusDetails.message: Expected new register to be present in the web table ==> expected: not <null>
